title: Five Guns to Tombstone
writer: Richard Schayer, Jack DeWitt, Arthur E. Orloff
actors: James Brown, John Wilder, Walter Coy
plot: Matt Wade escapes from prison and tries to persuade his brother Bill, a reformed gunslinger, to participate in a hold-up. Bill, now a struggling rancher, refuses but Matt frames him and he is forced to ride off with the gang.
